name: codex-adversarial-review
description: A methodology for stress-testing substantive prose, claims, or code with an adversarial second model (Codex) in two structured rounds: brief with artefact + vocabulary + a numbered attack-vector list, synthesise v2 with explicit adopt/reject/pushback, then re-attack v2 and rule on the pushbacks. Synthesise, never relay. Requires a Codex MCP/CLI (e.g. the codex@openai-codex plugin).
